race.comment: COLD AZA BEER (2) made his Tassie debut trying to lead throughout in a tougher event at Hobart and was run over late. This easier and small field suits. Much better draw and will take catching. LIGHT WORK (5) has been bursting to win finishing runner-up last few runs. Beaten just a neck last time here making it two minors from three tries this circuit. First attempt at the mile but close to a win and will go close. CALLED THROUGH (1) ran in the same race as COLD AZA BEER last time and steamed home from the back to finish fifth. This easier and will be winding up strongly. VOSTOK STATION (3) was poor fresh but thereabouts last time and can do better again third-up. AWESOME ORPHAN (4) wasn't far away latest just behind LIGHT WORK and is among the chances.
